source_description: In an apartment kitchen, Joey sits on the counter while Phoebe and Chandler sit in the living area. Ross walks through the green door into the kitchen.
Ross says, "Hi."
Ross closes the door and turns toward the room.
Ross approaches the kitchen counter and asks, "Sorry I'm late. Did I miss anything?" Phoebe, eating from a bowl of popcorn, replies, "Joey stuffing 15 Oreos in his mouth."
